reviews.review_title: Same as Game Mode on Wooorld ...
reviews.review_description:
... only with more leaderboards. Also, even nothing visible while testing, it already talks about "Only available in Premium Version"  (which I seem to own?) The Price Tag is nice, but I still don't understand why a "Spinoff" from the game mode. Splitting the Player base?
Of course, it seems the development will focus on a more specific topic with this app ... Still splitting the causal player from the causal? I don't know ... Time will tell.
Also, how the monetization (Premium Subscription maybe?) is kicking in ...
Fun, educational, easy mechanics and provides an ongoing challenge. I will be playing this often and watching the leaderboards. Great game - highly recommended.
I absolutely love this game. It’s the perfect blend of immersive exploration, social fun, and competitive excitement! I find myself playing frequently. App runs smoothly.

I originally downloaded Wooorld to help with my travel addiction but soon found myself playing their Where On Earth game. Now, I still get to see the world, but I also have a blast while doing it. The game can either be collaborative or competitive, but it immensely helped my skills in working with a team, my critical thinking skills, and my geography knowledge.
